chart_title: Expectation of l'infective life for 50% of females
notes: Title sits above the y-axis as a chart heading rather than as a rotated y-axis label. Six legend entries (3 scatter + 3 IF curves). 24°C blue-on-dashed-line markers were undercounted in baseline; v2 two-pass relaxed filter recovered them. European decimal comma.
